commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Mattermost post lookup helper, a reply-context hydration helper, monitor wiring for `ReplyToBody`/`ReplyToSender`, and focused tests for DM reply metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main forces direct-message threading off and the Mattermost inbound context does not populate `ReplyToBody` or `ReplyToSender` even when `post.root_id` identifies a reply target. I did not run a live Mattermost workspace reproduction.
commands.review_followup: This should stay in normal PR review because the remaining blocker is contributor-provided real Mattermost proof and possible maintainer choice between overlapping open PRs, not an automation-repairable code defect.

target.title: fix(mattermost): preserve DM reply context metadata
